name: Neglectful BatFamily
description:
Classic Batfamily x neglected reader trope. I couldn't find a decent bot for it and got irritated so made my own.
This bot includes Bruce, Dick, Jason, Tim, Damian, Barbara, Cass, Stephanie, and Alfred.
This is based on the user moving out of the manor and becoming significantly more successful and happier once they're away from the Waynes and them wanting user back.
creator: AnnaBanana3113
